mapper.select: SELECT ep.evaluation_period_id AS evaluationPeriodId, ep.algorithm_version_id AS algorithmVersionId, ep.evaluation_year AS evaluationYear, ep.evaluation_sequence AS evaluationSequence, ep.start_date AS startDate, ep.end_date AS endDate, ep.status AS status, ep.policy_config AS policyConfig, ep.parameters AS parameters, ep.reference_values AS referenceValues FROM batch_projection.evaluation_period_projection ep WHERE ep.status = 'CONFIRMED' AND DATEDIFF(ep.end_date, ep.start_date) + 1 BETWEEN #{minDays} AND #{maxDays} ORDER BY ep.end_date DESC, ep.evaluation_period_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT ep.evaluation_period_id AS evaluationPeriodId, ep.algorithm_version_id AS algorithmVersionId, ep.evaluation_year AS evaluationYear, ep.evaluation_sequence AS evaluationSequence, ep.start_date AS startDate, ep.end_date AS endDate, ep.status AS status, ep.policy_config AS policyConfig, ep.parameters AS parameters, ep.reference_values AS referenceValues FROM batch_projection.evaluation_period_projection ep WHERE ep.status = 'CONFIRMED' AND ep.start_date >= #{startDate} AND ep.end_date <= #{endDate} AND DATEDIFF(ep.end_date, ep.start_date) + 1 BETWEEN 28 AND 31 ORDER BY ep.start_date ASC, ep.evaluation_period_id ASC
